description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of three jobs: test-msvc-cppwinrt-build, test-msvc-cppwinrt-test, and test-llvm-mingw-cppwinrt. Each job runs on a windows-latest environment and performs various tasks such as setting up the environment, installing dependencies, building and testing C++ projects using MSVC and Clang compilers.
